entryPointCandidates.name: App.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: Root application component that defines all client-side routes and wraps role-restricted pages in authentication/authorization guards.

entryPointCandidates.name: playwright.config.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Playwright test runner configuration pointing at the e2e/ test directory, defining the base URL, Chromium project, retry/trace policy, and a webServer block that boots the built frontend against the FastAPI backend for CI.

entryPointCandidates.name: VoidApprovalsPage.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: Page for shop managers to review pending invoice void requests and approve or reject each one.

entryPointCandidates.name: ReceivingPage.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: Receiving workflow page where staff scan or enter barcodes to build a lot of received inventory, adjust quantities, and submit the lot to the backend.

entryPointCandidates.name: CheckoutPage.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: The main point-of-sale checkout screen: scans/looks up items by barcode, manages cart and split payments, finalizes sales against the API with offline-queue fallback, and displays/downloads the resulting invoice.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Root project manifest for the barstock-frontend React/TypeScript SPA, declaring dependencies (React Router, React DOM), dev tooling (Vite, ESLint, Tailwind, Playwright, openapi-typescript) and scripts for dev, build, lint, API type generation, and e2e testing.

config.name: tsconfig.app.json
config.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration for the application source code (compiler options plus include/exclude paths), separate from node tooling and e2e test configs.

config.name: tsconfig.e2e.json
config.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration scoped to Playwright end-to-end test files, with its own compiler options and include paths.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: Root TypeScript solution file that references the app, node, and e2e project configs via TypeScript's project-references mechanism, enabling the composite build (tsc -b) used in the build script.

config.name: tsconfig.node.json
config.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration for Node-side tooling (e.g. Vite config file), with its own compiler options and include paths distinct from the app and e2e configs.

config.name: eslint.config.js
config.summary: Flat ESLint configuration for the React/TypeScript frontend, wiring up TypeScript, React hooks, and React Refresh linting rules across the project.

config.name: playwright.config.ts
config.summary: Playwright test runner configuration pointing at the e2e/ test directory, defining the base URL, Chromium project, retry/trace policy, and a webServer block that boots the built frontend against the FastAPI backend for CI.

config.name: postcss.config.cjs
config.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling the Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for the build pipeline.

config.name: tailwind.config.ts
config.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme using the shared design tokens module and sets the content paths for class scanning.

config.name: vite.config.ts
config.summary: Vite build configuration wiring up the React plugin and dev server settings for the frontend application.

list.name: Application Shell
list.description: Bootstraps the React SPA (main.tsx, App.tsx, index.html), applies global styles and Tailwind design tokens, and provides Vite's ambient type declarations.

list.name: Pages & Routes
list.description: One React component per route (login, checkout, dashboard, receiving, products, staff, voids, shop config), each composing API calls and auth/shop-scope context into the screens shown to shop staff, owners, and superadmins.

list.name: API Client
list.description: Typed HTTP client (client.ts) plus per-domain wrapper modules (checkout, products, catalog cache, lots, staff, voids, shops, dashboard, offline finalize-queue) that talk to the FastAPI backend and are imported by nearly every page.

list.name: Auth & Multi-Shop Context
list.description: React context providers and JWT helpers that manage the authenticated session and the superadmin's 'acting shop' scope, consumed across almost all pages and shared components.

list.name: Shared Components
list.description: Reusable UI building blocks — the PIN entry keypad, the superadmin shop-switcher dropdown, and the role-filtered navigation sidebar — shared across multiple pages.

list.name: Offline Resilience Hooks
list.description: Custom hooks that detect browser connectivity and drain the offline checkout queue, enabling the POS screen to keep working through network outages.

list.name: End-to-End Tests
list.description: Playwright specs covering login, checkout resilience, dashboard, products, receiving, shop config, staff, and void-approval flows, driven by role-specific login helpers.

list.name: Build & Tooling Configuration
list.description: Project manifest, TypeScript project references, ESLint, Vite, Tailwind/PostCSS, and Playwright configuration that govern how the SPA is built, linted, styled, and tested.

file:src/App.tsx.name: App.tsx
file:src/App.tsx.summary: Root application component that defines all client-side routes and wraps role-restricted pages in authentication/authorization guards.

file:src/auth/AuthProvider.tsx.name: AuthProvider.tsx
file:src/auth/AuthProvider.tsx.summary: React context provider that manages the authenticated session (token, user, readiness), persists it to sessionStorage, and exposes login/logout and role-based home routing helpers.

file:src/auth/jwt.ts.name: jwt.ts
file:src/auth/jwt.ts.summary: Client-side JWT helper providing base64url payload decoding and expiry checking without any external dependency.

file:src/components/PinPad.tsx.name: PinPad.tsx
file:src/components/PinPad.tsx.summary: Reusable numeric keypad component used for PIN/phone/password entry with digit, backspace, clear, and submit callbacks plus keyboard support.

file:src/main.tsx.name: main.tsx
file:src/main.tsx.summary: Application bootstrap entry point that mounts the React tree, wiring AuthProvider and ShopScopeProvider around the App component and importing global styles.

file:src/pages/AdminPlaceholder.tsx.name: AdminPlaceholder.tsx
file:src/pages/AdminPlaceholder.tsx.summary: Placeholder page shown for admin routes not yet implemented, displaying the current path for context.

file:src/pages/ForbiddenPage.tsx.name: ForbiddenPage.tsx
file:src/pages/ForbiddenPage.tsx.summary: Error page shown when an authenticated user attempts to access a route their role does not permit.

file:src/pages/HomeRedirect.tsx.name: HomeRedirect.tsx
file:src/pages/HomeRedirect.tsx.summary: Redirect component that sends an authenticated user to the default landing page for their role.

file:src/pages/LoginPage.tsx.name: LoginPage.tsx
file:src/pages/LoginPage.tsx.summary: Shop-staff login page using a PIN-pad style phone/password entry flow that authenticates against the API and redirects to the role-appropriate home page.

file:src/pages/SuperadminLoginPage.tsx.name: SuperadminLoginPage.tsx
file:src/pages/SuperadminLoginPage.tsx.summary: Login page for superadmin users using username/password fields, authenticating via the API and redirecting to the superadmin dashboard.

file:src/api/checkout.ts.name: checkout.ts
file:src/api/checkout.ts.summary: API client functions for finalizing a checkout, fetching an invoice by ID, and downloading invoice PDFs.

file:src/api/client.ts.name: client.ts
file:src/api/client.ts.summary: Core fetch wrapper used by every API module: attaches auth headers from session storage, serializes JSON bodies, and normalizes error responses via ApiError.

file:src/api/dashboard.ts.name: dashboard.ts
file:src/api/dashboard.ts.summary: API calls for retrieving end-of-day totals, signing off the day, fetching EOD history, and listing low-stock items, all scoped by shop.

file:src/api/staff.ts.name: staff.ts
file:src/api/staff.ts.summary: API calls to list existing staff and create new staff members within a shop.

file:src/api/voids.ts.name: voids.ts
file:src/api/voids.ts.summary: API calls to request, approve, and reject invoice voids, and list pending voids for approval.

file:src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx.name: DashboardPage.tsx
file:src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx.summary: Owner/manager dashboard page showing today's EOD totals, low-stock alerts, and sign-off history, with an action to sign off the business day.

file:src/pages/InvoiceLookupPage.tsx.name: InvoiceLookupPage.tsx
file:src/pages/InvoiceLookupPage.tsx.summary: Page allowing staff to look up an invoice by numeric ID, view its line items and payments, and request a void.

file:src/pages/StaffPage.tsx.name: StaffPage.tsx
file:src/pages/StaffPage.tsx.summary: Staff management page listing shop staff and providing a form to create new staff members with role, credentials, and PIN reset controls.

file:src/pages/VoidApprovalsPage.tsx.name: VoidApprovalsPage.tsx
file:src/pages/VoidApprovalsPage.tsx.summary: Page for shop managers to review pending invoice void requests and approve or reject each one.

file:src/api/catalog.ts.name: catalog.ts
file:src/api/catalog.ts.summary: Client-side in-memory cache of active products keyed by barcode, used to resolve barcodes quickly during receiving and checkout without hitting the API on every scan.

file:src/api/lots.ts.name: lots.ts
file:src/api/lots.ts.summary: API wrapper for creating and listing inventory receiving lots, including a validated safe-create helper that surfaces friendly error messages.

file:src/api/products.ts.name: products.ts
file:src/api/products.ts.summary: API wrapper for listing, creating, updating products, and bulk-importing products from a CSV file upload.

file:src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx.name: ProductsPage.tsx
file:src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx.summary: Product management page offering list/create/import tabs for browsing, editing, creating, and bulk-importing shop products.

file:src/pages/ReceivingPage.tsx.name: ReceivingPage.tsx
file:src/pages/ReceivingPage.tsx.summary: Receiving workflow page where staff scan or enter barcodes to build a lot of received inventory, adjust quantities, and submit the lot to the backend.

file:src/api/shops.ts.name: shops.ts
file:src/api/shops.ts.summary: API client functions for shop data: listing all shops (superadmin), fetching the current/acting shop, and updating shop configuration (name, GSTIN, excise duty rate, low-stock threshold).

file:src/auth/ShopScopeProvider.tsx.name: ShopScopeProvider.tsx
file:src/auth/ShopScopeProvider.tsx.summary: React context provider that tracks which shop a superadmin is currently 'acting as', persisting the selection in sessionStorage and exposing it via the useShopScope hook.

file:src/components/ShopPicker.tsx.name: ShopPicker.tsx
file:src/components/ShopPicker.tsx.summary: Dropdown component shown to superadmins that lists all shops and lets them switch their 'acting shop' scope, persisted via ShopScopeProvider.

file:src/components/Sidebar.tsx.name: Sidebar.tsx
file:src/components/Sidebar.tsx.summary: Main application sidebar navigation component that filters visible menu items by the current user's role and provides logout functionality.

file:src/pages/ShopConfigPage.tsx.name: ShopConfigPage.tsx
file:src/pages/ShopConfigPage.tsx.summary: Owner/superadmin settings page for viewing and editing shop configuration (GSTIN, excise duty rate, low-stock threshold), with load/save state handling and shop-scope awareness.

file:src/api/finalize-queue.ts.name: finalize-queue.ts
file:src/api/finalize-queue.ts.summary: Implements a localStorage-backed offline queue for checkout finalize requests, letting sales be recorded locally and later flushed to the API when connectivity returns.

file:src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts.name: useOnlineStatus.ts
file:src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts.summary: React hook that tracks browser online/offline connectivity by subscribing to window online and offline events.

file:src/hooks/useRetryQueue.ts.name: useRetryQueue.ts
file:src/hooks/useRetryQueue.ts.summary: React hook that combines online-status detection with the finalize queue to automatically flush pending offline checkouts when the app regains connectivity or on a polling interval.

file:src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx.name: CheckoutPage.tsx
file:src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx.summary: The main point-of-sale checkout screen: scans/looks up items by barcode, manages cart and split payments, finalizes sales against the API with offline-queue fallback, and displays/downloads the resulting invoice.

file:index.html.name: index.html
file:index.html.summary: Vite application HTML shell that provides the root DOM mount point and loads the TypeScript entry module for the React SPA.

config:package.json.name: package.json
config:package.json.summary: Root project manifest for the barstock-frontend React/TypeScript SPA, declaring dependencies (React Router, React DOM), dev tooling (Vite, ESLint, Tailwind, Playwright, openapi-typescript) and scripts for dev, build, lint, API type generation, and e2e testing.

config:tsconfig.app.json.name: tsconfig.app.json
config:tsconfig.app.json.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration for the application source code (compiler options plus include/exclude paths), separate from node tooling and e2e test configs.

config:tsconfig.e2e.json.name: tsconfig.e2e.json
config:tsconfig.e2e.json.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration scoped to Playwright end-to-end test files, with its own compiler options and include paths.

config:tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:tsconfig.json.summary: Root TypeScript solution file that references the app, node, and e2e project configs via TypeScript's project-references mechanism, enabling the composite build (tsc -b) used in the build script.

config:tsconfig.node.json.name: tsconfig.node.json
config:tsconfig.node.json.summary: TypeScript project-reference configuration for Node-side tooling (e.g. Vite config file), with its own compiler options and include paths distinct from the app and e2e configs.

file:e2e/checkout-resilience.spec.ts.name: checkout-resilience.spec.ts
file:e2e/checkout-resilience.spec.ts.summary: Playwright e2e spec verifying checkout flow resilience under network failures and offline conditions, using a cashier login helper to reach the POS screen.

file:e2e/checkout.spec.ts.name: checkout.spec.ts
file:e2e/checkout.spec.ts.summary: Playwright e2e spec covering the standard cashier checkout flow, from login through completing a sale.

file:e2e/dashboard.spec.ts.name: dashboard.spec.ts
file:e2e/dashboard.spec.ts.summary: Playwright e2e spec validating the owner dashboard, using role-specific login helpers for owner and cashier scenarios.

file:e2e/login.smoke.spec.ts.name: login.smoke.spec.ts
file:e2e/login.smoke.spec.ts.summary: Smoke test spec verifying the phone/PIN login flow renders and authenticates correctly against a live backend.

file:e2e/products.spec.ts.name: products.spec.ts
file:e2e/products.spec.ts.summary: Playwright e2e spec covering product catalog management, including owner and cashier permission checks.

file:e2e/receiving.spec.ts.name: receiving.spec.ts
file:e2e/receiving.spec.ts.summary: Playwright e2e spec verifying the stock receiving workflow using a receiver-role login helper.

file:e2e/shop-config.spec.ts.name: shop-config.spec.ts
file:e2e/shop-config.spec.ts.summary: Playwright e2e spec covering shop configuration settings, verifying owner-only access versus cashier restrictions.

file:e2e/staff.spec.ts.name: staff.spec.ts
file:e2e/staff.spec.ts.summary: Playwright e2e spec covering staff management features, verifying owner-only access versus cashier restrictions.

file:e2e/voids.spec.ts.name: voids.spec.ts
file:e2e/voids.spec.ts.summary: Playwright e2e spec covering sale void/refund workflows, verifying owner and cashier permission boundaries.

config:eslint.config.js.name: eslint.config.js
config:eslint.config.js.summary: Flat ESLint configuration for the React/TypeScript frontend, wiring up TypeScript, React hooks, and React Refresh linting rules across the project.

config:playwright.config.ts.name: playwright.config.ts
config:playwright.config.ts.summary: Playwright test runner configuration pointing at the e2e/ test directory, defining the base URL, Chromium project, retry/trace policy, and a webServer block that boots the built frontend against the FastAPI backend for CI.

config:postcss.config.cjs.name: postcss.config.cjs
config:postcss.config.cjs.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling the Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for the build pipeline.

file:src/index.css.name: index.css
file:src/index.css.summary: Global stylesheet that loads Tailwind's base, components, and utilities layers and defines a few root-level style resets for the application.

file:src/theme/tokens.ts.name: tokens.ts
file:src/theme/tokens.ts.summary: Design token module exporting a shared `tokens` object (colors, spacing, and related design constants) consumed by the Tailwind configuration to keep styling consistent across the app.

file:src/vite-env.d.ts.name: vite-env.d.ts
file:src/vite-env.d.ts.summary: Vite-generated ambient type declaration file that pulls in Vite's client types for the TypeScript compiler.

config:tailwind.config.ts.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme using the shared design tokens module and sets the content paths for class scanning.

config:vite.config.ts.name: vite.config.ts
